# SecCode

**Class**

A code object representing signed code running on the system.

## Declaration

```swift
class SecCode
```

## Overview

In many function calls, a value of type [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCode] can be passed to a parameter that is typed as a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecStaticCode]. In these cases, the function performs an implicit call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeCopyStaticCode(_:_:_:)] function and operates on the result.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
